subcodes.first_line: O thou beloved daughter!  Thy letter was received… After the declaration of the constitutional regime in Turkey in 1908
subcodes.first_line_orig: این مسجون چهل ساله بعد از آزادی مدت ۳ سال یعنی از سنه هزار و نهصد و ده تا
